messages.author: Priya Nair (Sales)
messages.text: Hey everyone, has anyone heard when we're actually supposed to be back in the office? My manager mentioned something about a hybrid schedule starting in the fall but I haven't seen anything official.

thread_replies.author: Marcus Bell (Engineering)
thread_replies.text: Same question here, my whole pod is confused about this.

thread_replies.author: Devon Choi (Marketing)
thread_replies.text: +1, heard September but no confirmed date.

thread_replies.author: Sofia Ramos (Support)
thread_replies.text: Support has been asking too, we need to plan shift coverage.

thread_replies.author: Ha-eun Park (Finance)
thread_replies.text: Finance is wondering the same, some of us moved further away during remote years.

thread_replies.author: Trevor James (Ops)
thread_replies.text: Ops leadership hasn't said anything concrete to us either.

thread_replies.author: Priya Nair (Sales)
thread_replies.text: Glad it's not just me, hoping HR sends something soon.

thread_replies.author: Wei Chen (Product)
thread_replies.text: Product team is also asking - would help to know before we plan the offsite.

thread_replies.author: Marcus Bell (Engineering)
thread_replies.text: bump - anyone from HR able to confirm?

messages.author: Marcus Bell (Engineering)
messages.text: Congrats to our new CFO! Anyone know more about Jordan Kim and what this means for how budget approvals will work going forward?

thread_replies.author: Ha-eun Park (Finance)
thread_replies.text: Finance got a short heads up but not much detail on process changes yet.

thread_replies.author: Devon Choi (Marketing)
thread_replies.text: Curious if marketing budget approvals will change too.

thread_replies.author: Trevor James (Ops)
thread_replies.text: Ops is wondering if this affects our vendor contract sign-off process.

thread_replies.author: Sofia Ramos (Support)
thread_replies.text: Hoping this means faster approvals for support tooling requests!

thread_replies.author: Wei Chen (Product)
thread_replies.text: Would be great to know the start date.

thread_replies.author: Priya Nair (Sales)
thread_replies.text: Sales ops has the same question about deal desk approvals.

thread_replies.author: Leah Fischer (People)
thread_replies.text: People team will share more once finance finalizes the transition plan.

messages.author: Dana Osei (IT)
messages.text: Quick one - anyone know how to reset a Cisco AnyConnect VPN profile on a brand new MacBook? Getting a cert error on my personal setup only.

thread_replies.author: Ray Alcott (IT)
thread_replies.text: DM me, I can walk you through the cert reinstall, it's a one-off issue with your machine image.
